name: trader
description: Script-output skill. MUST run scripts/final_report.py and return validated stdout verbatim; never handwrite, summarize, shorten, restyle, translate, or append follow-up lines. Output must start with 分析报告 —, include MA5/MA10/MA20/MA30, and contain no T0/做T/t0-trader/执行价 content. If output contains T0 template references, rerun the script.
